tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsCancelPreview
tools.description: Cancels and removes the preview currently associated with the deployment.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a deployment and all of the resources in the deployment.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsGet
tools.description: Gets information about a specific deployment.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. May be empty if no such policy or resource exists.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsInsert
tools.description: Creates a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsList
tools.description: Lists all deployments for a given project.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsPatch
tools.description: Patches a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsStop
tools.description: Stops an ongoing operation. This does not roll back any work that has already been completed, but prevents any new work from being started.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource.

tools.name: deployments.deploymentmanagerDeploymentsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.

tools.name: manifests.deploymentmanagerManifestsGet
tools.description: Gets information about a specific manifest.

tools.name: manifests.deploymentmanagerManifestsList
tools.description: Lists all manifests for a given deployment.

tools.name: operations.deploymentmanagerOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets information about a specific operation.

tools.name: operations.deploymentmanagerOperationsList
tools.description: Lists all operations for a project.

tools.name: resources.deploymentmanagerResourcesGet
tools.description: Gets information about a single resource.

tools.name: resources.deploymentmanagerResourcesList
tools.description: Lists all resources in a given deployment.

tools.name: types.deploymentmanagerTypesList
tools.description: Lists all resource types for Deployment Manager.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
